'''鈭歵h-dh-p''' ('''thadhapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:linker|linker]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:linker|linker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-dh-p
|-
! Lemma
| thadhapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhapithi|thadhapithi]] || [[word:thadhapiji|thadhapiji]] || [[word:thadhapishi|thadhapishi]] || [[word:thadhapi|thadhapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhaputhuth|thadhaputhuth]] || [[word:thadhapujuj|thadhapujuj]] || [[word:thadhapushush|thadhapushush]] || [[word:thadhap|thadhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhaputhu|thadhaputhu]] || [[word:thadhapuju|thadhapuju]] || [[word:thadhapushu|thadhapushu]] || [[word:thadhapu|thadhapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhapufuth|thadhapufuth]] || [[word:thadhapufuj|thadhapufuj]] || [[word:thadhapufush|thadhapufush]] || [[word:thadhapuf|thadhapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhapethe|thadhapethe]] || [[word:thadhapeje|thadhapeje]] || [[word:thadhapeshe|thadhapeshe]] || [[word:thadhape|thadhape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhapothoth|thadhapothoth]] || [[word:thadhapojoj|thadhapojoj]] || [[word:thadhaposhosh|thadhaposhosh]] || [[word:thadhap|thadhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhapotho|thadhapotho]] || [[word:thadhapojo|thadhapojo]] || [[word:thadhaposho|thadhaposho]] || [[word:thadhapo|thadhapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhapofoth|thadhapofoth]] || [[word:thadhapofoj|thadhapofoj]] || [[word:thadhapofosh|thadhapofosh]] || [[word:thadhapof|thadhapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhap忙th忙|thadhap忙th忙]] || [[word:thadhap忙j忙|thadhap忙j忙]] || [[word:thadhap忙sh忙|thadhap忙sh忙]] || [[word:thadhap忙|thadhap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhapathath|thadhapathath]] || [[word:thadhapajaj|thadhapajaj]] || [[word:thadhapashash|thadhapashash]] || [[word:thadhap|thadhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhapatha|thadhapatha]] || [[word:thadhapaja|thadhapaja]] || [[word:thadhapasha|thadhapasha]] || [[word:thadhapa|thadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhapafath|thadhapafath]] || [[word:thadhapafaj|thadhapafaj]] || [[word:thadhapafash|thadhapafash]] || [[word:thadhapaf|thadhapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thadhapasha|thadhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothadhapasha|gothadhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithadhapasha|gokithadhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thadhapn眉sha|thadhapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothadhapnkn眉sha|gothadhapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhapn眉sha|gokithadhapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadhapsh毛sha|thadhapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadhapnksh毛sha|gothadhapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadhapsh毛sha|gokithadhapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhaprosha|thadhaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhapnkrosha|gothadhapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhaprosha|gokithadhaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhapmusha|thadhapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhapnkmusha|gothadhapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhapmusha|gokithadhapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thadhapsherasha|thadhapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothadhapnksherasha|gothadhapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithadhapsherasha|gokithadhapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thadhapngasha|thadhapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothadhapnkngasha|gothadhapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithadhapngasha|gokithadhapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thadhapyasha|thadhapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothadhapnkyasha|gothadhapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithadhapyasha|gokithadhapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thadhapyamasha|thadhapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothadhapnkyamasha|gothadhapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithadhapyamasha|gokithadhapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhapn眉sh毛sha|thadhapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhapnkn眉sh毛sha|gothadhapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhapn眉sh毛sha|gokithadhapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhapn眉rosha|thadhapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhapnkn眉rosha|gothadhapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhapn眉rosha|gokithadhapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhapn眉musha|thadhapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhapnkn眉musha|gothadhapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhapn眉musha|gokithadhapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhapsh毛n眉sha|thadhapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhapnksh毛n眉sha|gothadhapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhapsh毛n眉sha|gokithadhapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhapsh毛rosha|thadhapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhapnksh毛rosha|gothadhapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhapsh毛rosha|gokithadhapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhapsh毛musha|thadhapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhapnksh毛musha|gothadhapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhapsh毛musha|gokithadhapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhapron眉sha|thadhapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhapnkron眉sha|gothadhapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhapron眉sha|gokithadhapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhaprosh毛sha|thadhaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhapnkrosh毛sha|gothadhapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhaprosh毛sha|gokithadhaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhapromusha|thadhapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhapnkromusha|gothadhapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhapromusha|gokithadhapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhapmun眉sha|thadhapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhapnkmun眉sha|gothadhapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhapmun眉sha|gokithadhapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhapmush毛sha|thadhapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhapnkmush毛sha|gothadhapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhapmush毛sha|gokithadhapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhapmurosha|thadhapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhapnkmurosha|gothadhapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhapmurosha|gokithadhapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thadhap|thadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙dh忙p|th忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothadhap|hothadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙dh忙p|hoth忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothadhap|hohothadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙dh忙p|hohoth忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thadhap|n眉thadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙dh忙p|n眉th忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thadhap|n眉n眉thadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙dh忙p|n眉n眉th忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thadhap|n茂thadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙dh忙p|n茂th忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thadhap|n茂n茂thadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙dh忙p|n茂n茂th忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthadhap|luthadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙dh忙p|luth忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthadhap|luluthadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙dh忙p|luluth忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithadhap|lithadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙dh忙p|lith忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithadhap|lilithadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙dh忙p|lilith忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothadhap|kothadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙dh忙p|koth忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothadhap|kokothadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙dh忙p|kokoth忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethadhap|kethadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙dh忙p|keth忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethadhap|kekethadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙dh忙p|keketh忙dh忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
